Today is not just a birthday.

Someone whose smile brings peace,
whose presence brings comfort,
and whose happiness means the world to me.

From The Heart

A Letter For You

Dear Hakima ❤️,
Our Story

Memories I Treasure

🚌
The Bus Day

One day Hakima passed very close to me while sitting on a bus.

I was standing on the road, yet somehow we missed seeing each other.

Later when she realised it was me, she became emotional and cried.

That moment taught me how much our presence means to each other.

🍬
Our First Date

Our first date was at a sweet shop.

Hakima was wearing a mask.

I was nervous, excited, and trying to act normal.

It was a simple moment, but it became one of my favourite memories forever.

🎂
Birthday Celebration

Watching Hakima smile while cutting her birthday cake is a memory I will always treasure.

That smile — quiet, warm, and full of joy — stayed with me long after the day ended.

Always & Forever

Happy Birthday Hakima ❤️

Thank you for being one of the most beautiful parts of my life.

Thank you for your smile, your kindness, and every memory we share.

You are more special than words can describe.

May your life be filled with happiness, success, and endless reasons to smile.

I Love You ❤️
